news.title: A long-buried secret hidden in a cosy game about books made me realise something essential
news.titleEN: A long-buried secret hidden in a cosy game about books made me realise something essential
news.desc: Hello! Eurogamer is once again marking Pride with a week of features celebrating the intersection of queer culture and gaming in all its guises. Things get underway today as Lottie plays historian in Tiny Bookshop and is moved by what she finds. And

news.title: Tetris: World Builders is a new animated series for kids "inspired by the iconic falling blocks that have captivated players for generations"
news.titleEN: Tetris: World Builders is a new animated series for kids "inspired by the iconic falling blocks that have captivated players for generations"
news.desc: A new animated series dedicated to the Tetris game is on the way to inspire children to take up STEAM careers – that is, STEM subjects (science, technology, engineering, and maths) combined with the arts. Read more

news.title: Claims GTA 6 is selling 8 times as many copies on PS5 as Xbox "doesn't represent pre-order data", insists Microsoft
news.titleEN: Claims GTA 6 is selling 8 times as many copies on PS5 as Xbox "doesn't represent pre-order data", insists Microsoft
news.desc: Microsoft has refuted claims that its rival system, the PlayStation 5, is outselling the Xbox edition of Grand Theft Auto 6, claiming that the figure "doesn't represent pre-order data" and insisting "we've had record orders". Read more

news.title: Star Wars Eclipse "literally cannot be finished" without more staff, insist striking Quantic Dream developers
news.titleEN: Star Wars Eclipse "literally cannot be finished" without more staff, insist striking Quantic Dream developers
news.desc: Striking staff at Quantic Dream have warned that if the studio proceeds with its plans to lay off 115 developers, its upcoming Star Wars Eclipse game "literally cannot be finished". Read more

news.title: Viral hide-and-seek indie hit Meccha Chameleon sells 10m copies in just 16 days
news.titleEN: Viral hide-and-seek indie hit Meccha Chameleon sells 10m copies in just 16 days
news.desc: Just five days ago, we reported that indie hide-and-seek game Meccha Chameleon had sold seven million copies since its release on 10th June, and now it's topped another staggering milestone: 10 million copies sold. Read more
